/usr/bin/cc  -arch arm64 -dynamiclib -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names -o libnanoarrow_shared.dylib -install_name @rpath/libnanoarrow_shared.dylib CMakeFiles/nanoarrow_shared.dir/src/nanoarrow/common/array.c.o CMakeFiles/nanoarrow_shared.dir/src/nanoarrow/common/schema.c.o CMakeFiles/nanoarrow_shared.dir/src/nanoarrow/common/array_stream.c.o CMakeFiles/nanoarrow_shared.dir/src/nanoarrow/common/utils.c.o
